$comment: Copy to scripts/star-chart.local.json (gitignored) and edit. All scripts (db:seed, db:migrate, db:new-period) read it. Env vars override these values when set.

period.$comment: Game tuning. startsOn null = tonight is night 1. xRequired/graceTokens/checkpointDays defaults scale for 14/21/28 if you leave them null.

database.$comment: Omit or leave url null for local dev (file:local.db). For production runs set both: url from `turso db show star-chart --url`, authToken from `turso db tokens create star-chart`.
